description_long: This object is a realistic sunflower with a large, circular head composed of numerous yellow petals radiating outward from a dark brown, textured central disk. The petals are narrow, pointed, and arranged in a dense, radial pattern, giving the flower a full and symmetrical appearance. The central disk is slightly convex and densely packed, mimicking the seed arrangement typical of sunflowers. The flower is supported by a long, green stem that is slightly curved and features two elongated, lanceolate leaves attached at different heights. The overall structure is slender and upright, with the flower head prominently displayed at the top. The coloration is naturalistic, with vibrant yellow petals, a deep brown center, and a bright green stem and leaves.
description: A tall sunflower with bright yellow, pointed petals radiating from a dark brown center, supported by a green stem with two lanceolate leaves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the sunflower, highlighting the thickness of the central disk and the curvature of the stem.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the sunflower head, the green stem, and both leaves clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the narrowness of the flower and the alignment of the stem and leaves.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the full face of the sunflower, with all petals and the central disk clearly visible.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial pattern around the central disk, with each petal overlapping slightly at the base and radiating outward symmetrically, typical of a whorled configuration.
